name: Casados con Hijos [Colombia]
overview:
Casados con Hijos was the 2004 Colombian remake of the American (U.S.) sitcom comedy Married...With Children. It was produced by Caracol TV and Sony Columbia Pictures subsidiary CPT Holdings.

It features the Rochas (the Colombian version of the Bundys) living in Bogotá with their neighbors, the Pachóns (the D'Arcys), using copied sets and situations from the original series, but adapted to the Colombian urban environment.

trailers.title: Amparo se prepara para pedir un ascenso | Temporada 1 | Casados con hijos
